title: Pakistan’s interior minister to meet Iran’s Araqchi during Tehran visit, ISNA says

snapshot.title: Pakistan’s interior minister to meet Iran’s Araqchi during Tehran visit, ISNA says
snapshot.description: DUBAI: Pakistan Interior ​Minister Mohsin Naqvi is due to hold talks ‌with ‌Iranian ​Foreign ‌Minister ⁠Abbas Araqchi ​during a ⁠visit to Tehran on Saturday, Iranian ⁠Foreign Ministry ‌spokesperson Esmaeil ‌Baghaei ​said, ‌according ‌to ISNA news agency. Baghaei said Naqvi’s ‌visit is part of ⁠Islamabad’s ⁠ongoing efforts related to negotiations between Iran and the United
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Pakistan’s interior minister to meet Iran’s Araqchi during Tehran visit, ISNA says | Arab News
